subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, Who hath revealed the Torah and the Gospel and the Qur'an. Exalted is the All-Merciful Who, through the Qur'an [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی انزل التوراه و الانجیل و الفرقان تعالی الرحمن الذی بالفرقان
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
